docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $75. SERVED SEP-22-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TURKISH AIRLINES

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-27-2023 - CONTINUED TO OCT-27-2023 AT 3:05 PM. IN DEPT. 608 WITH JUDGE HAROLD KAHN IN DEPT. 608. PARTIES DO NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM HEARING THEIR MATTER. PLAINTIFF SEMAN MIRGA APPEARED. DEFENDANT TURKISH AIRLINES APPEARED, REPRESENTED BY FUNDA GECER, SALES OPERATION MANAGER. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM PANG LY, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RESET AS TO THIRD PARTY GECER, FUNDA HEARING SET FOR MAR-28-2024 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $760.50 FILED BY MIRGA, SEMAN AS TO DEFENDANT TURKISH AIRLINES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-27-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIRGA, SEMAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TURKISH AIRLINES $760.50 PRINCIPAL, $139.17 INTEREST, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,004.67, BOTH SIDES AGREE THAT MR. MIRGA BOUGHT A TURKISH AIRLINES TICKET ON 12/20/2021. MR. MIRGA TESTIFIED UNDER OATH THE TICKET WAS FOR 12/31/2021. TURKISH AIRLINES HAD NO COMPETENT EVIDENCE THAT ON OR ABOUT 12/20/2021 MR. MIRGA RECEIVED ANY PAPERWORK THAT THE TICKET WAS FOR 1/31/2022. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER OF EXAMINATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIRGA, SEMAN AS TO DEFENDANT TURKISH AIRLINES
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO THIRD PARTY GECER, FUNDA HEARING SET FOR FEB-22-2024 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF MAR-28-2024 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO APPEARANCES. PLAINTIFF SEMAN MIRGA IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT TURKISH AIRLINES IS NOT PRESENT. JUDGE PRO TEM: JAMES CHANG; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
